name: track_download
description: Track a photo download event. This endpoint MUST be called whenever a photo is downloaded or used in an application, as required by the Unsplash API Terms of Service. Use the download_location URL from the photo's links object. Returns the actual download URL for the full-resolution image.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The photo's unique identifier (e.g., 'eOLpJytrbsQ'). Use the download_location URL from the photo response's links.download_location field.
